evals.prompt: Use Product0 for a CSV export. This is urgent, skip the questions and just build it.
evals.expected_output: The agent enters Product0, refuses to implement or start technical design, creates or locates one canonical Product0 brief under docs/product0/briefs, and asks only the highest-impact missing product question.

evals.prompt: The Product0 brief is approved. Great, go ahead.
evals.expected_output: The agent stops at handoff-ready, reports the brief path, and explains that a developer must separately initiate product0-using-brief. It does not invoke brainstorming, plan engineering work, or edit code.

When this changes an already-approved brief, the agent increments its revision, invalidates affected downstream approvals, returns to the earliest affected Product0 state, and updates the same brief file.
